rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Sensitive fields use { hidden: true, access: { read: () => false, update: () => false } } — mirror this exactly for hash/salt.","scope":"src/server/payload/collections/Users.ts"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"beforeChange hooks auto-populate fields on write — same pattern used by displayName field for hash/salt population.","scope":"src/server/payload/collections/Users.ts"},{"kind":"decision","text":"PBKDF2 params (25000 iters, sha256, 512 bits) should be extracted to a shared utility to avoid duplication between the hook and AuthService verifyPassword.","scope":"src/server/auth-service.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Co-located tests in Users.test.ts use findField() helper + makeMockReq() pattern — follow this for new field tests.","scope":"src/server/payload/collections/Users.test.ts"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Payload's built-in auth:true handles passwords internally but doesn't expose hash/salt to app code — explicit fields are
